candidate_source_policy.notes: High-star external repositories are references and candidate sources. They are not trusted production dependencies until staged and verified.

candidate_sources.name: ECC
candidate_sources.use_case: agent harness construction, regression testing, production-quality workflow patterns

candidate_sources.name: awesome-claude-skills
candidate_sources.use_case: discover vetted Claude skills and skill design patterns

candidate_sources.name: antigravity-awesome-skills
candidate_sources.use_case: large installable skill library for coding/design workflow candidates

candidate_sources.name: awesome-cursorrules
candidate_sources.use_case: coding style, framework-specific AI editor rules, and frontend implementation conventions

candidate_sources.name: claude-task-master
candidate_sources.use_case: task breakdown, status tracking, and implementation planning for AI-assisted development

candidate_sources.name: 12-factor-agents
candidate_sources.use_case: principles for durable LLM-powered software and agent control boundaries

candidate_sources.name: ai-dev-tasks
candidate_sources.use_case: AI dev task lifecycle and status discipline

candidate_sources.name: anthropics-skills
candidate_sources.use_case: official agent skill packaging patterns and reusable workflow contracts

candidate_sources.name: vercel-agent-skills
candidate_sources.use_case: frontend, deployment, and product engineering skill patterns

candidate_sources.name: awesome-agent-skills
candidate_sources.use_case: cross-tool skill discovery for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and related agents

candidate_sources.name: LangGraph
candidate_sources.use_case: durable execution, state checkpoints, human-in-the-loop workflow design

candidate_sources.name: AutoGen
candidate_sources.use_case: multi-agent role boundaries, conversation orchestration, and handoff patterns

candidate_sources.name: Haystack
candidate_sources.use_case: production RAG pipelines, retrieval routing, and modular context engineering

candidate_sources.name: RAGAS
candidate_sources.notes: GitHub API was rate-limited during the final sampling pass; keep as evaluation reference, not as a star-ranked install source.
candidate_sources.use_case: RAG retrieval and faithfulness evaluation patterns

description: Portable manifest for updating installed skills from their source repositories or registries.

manual_skill_policy.message: No source is registered for this skill. Add a source entry before enabling automatic update.

update_policy.notes: In enterprise production, the GUI update button must not overwrite the active Hermes or skill set directly. Use bin/update-system for status and candidate staging. GitHub-backed skills update via git in a candidate copy. Registry-backed skills are checked through skills hub metadata. Manual skills are reported as manual.
